center.name: North Queensland
center.summary: North Queensland是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Greater sooty owl、Crimson rosella、Yellow thornbill，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: A disparate population occurs in North Queensland. Around 1910, a small number of crimson rosellas were released off the Otago Heads, New Zealand, along with eastern rosellas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: (2008) 'Systematics and Taxonomy of Australian Birds.' (CSIRO Publishing: Collingwood) It is substantially smaller and occurs in the wet tropics region of North Queensland, Australia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Within these zones, yellow thornbills are found in a variety of habitats including shrublands, forests and thickets, preferring vegetation dominated by casuarinas or eucalypts, particularly in areas with a drier climate. Their range extends from northern and central west Queensland, south along the eastern coast of Australia through much of New South Wales, throughout Victoria and the Australian Capital Territory, and into the southeastern corner of South Australia
